terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.welcome: Welcome to Inuk! These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the Inuk mobile application and related services (collectively, the "Service"). By creating an account or using Inuk, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.
terms.sec1_text: You must be at least 13 years old to use the Service. If you are under 18, you represent that you have your parent or guardian's permission to use the Service.
terms.sec2_text: You are responsible for keeping your account password secure. You must provide accurate information when creating an account and you agree not to share your account credentials or let anyone else access your account.
terms.sec3_text: You retain ownership of any photos, videos, comments, or other materials ("Content") you post on Inuk. By posting Content, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, copy, reproduce, process, adapt, modify, publish, transmit, display, and distribute your Content across the Service.
terms.sec4_text: You agree not to post Content or use the Service in a way that:
terms.sec4_bullet1: Violates anyone's intellectual property or privacy rights.
terms.sec4_bullet2: Contains hate speech, harassment, bullying, or threats.
terms.sec4_bullet3: Depicts graphic violence, nudity, or sexually explicit material.
terms.sec4_bullet5: Uses automated means (bots, scrapers) to access the Service.
terms.sec5_text: We respect intellectual property rights. If you believe your copyright has been infringed, please contact us with a formal DMCA takedown notice. We reserve the right to remove Content alleged to be infringing and to terminate repeat infringers.
terms.sec6_text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time, with or without notice, if we believe you have violated these Terms or for any other reason.
terms.sec7_text: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Inuk shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of the Service.
terms.sec8_text: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Service after changes implies acceptance of the new Terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Inuk, your privacy is a top priority. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and share information about you when you use our mobile app and services.
privacy.sec1_text1: When you create an account, we collect your username, display name, email address, password, and profile picture. We also collect the content you create, upload, or interact with.
privacy.sec1_text2: We collect usage data, device identifiers, IP addresses, operating system details, and interaction analytics to ensure the app functions properly.
privacy.sec2_intro: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.sec2_bullet1: Provide, maintain, and improve the Service.
privacy.sec2_bullet2: Personalize your content feed and recommendations.
privacy.sec2_bullet3: Monitor and prevent fraud, spam, and abuse.
privacy.sec2_bullet4: Communicate with you about updates and support.
privacy.sec3_intro: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information:
privacy.sec3_bullet1: With other users (your public profile and posts).
privacy.sec3_bullet2: With service providers who help us run the app (e.g., cloud hosting, analytics).
privacy.sec3_bullet3: To comply with legal obligations or respond to lawful requests.
privacy.sec3_bullet4: To enforce our Terms of Service and protect our community.
privacy.sec4_text: You can request to delete your account and personal data at any time through the app settings. Once deleted, your profile and posts will be permanently removed from our active systems.
privacy.sec5_text: Inuk is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that we have collected such information, we will take steps to delete it.
privacy.sec6_text: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your data. However, no electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.sec7_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us via the support section in the app.
